name: Corpse Reviver #2

spec.method_detail: Rinse chilled coupe with absinthe. Shake remaining ingredients with ice. Double strain into rinsed glass.

history: Harry Craddock published both Corpse Revivers in the 'Savoy Cocktail Book' (1930) as hangover cures — hence the name. He added the famous warning: 'four of these taken in swift succession will unrevive the corpse again.' It's an equal-parts cocktail with an absinthe rinse — unusual, complex, and addictive. The #1 is a brandy-calvados build; the #2 is the gin version that's become the classic.
